objectives.title: Geothermal Capacity Expansion to 1,000 MW
objectives.description: Expand geothermal installed capacity from 706 MW to 1,000 MW by 2027 through Olkaria VI and Menengai projects, aligned with Kenya Vision 2030 energy pillar

objectives.title: Regional Power Export Programme
objectives.description: Export 200 MW of surplus geothermal power to Uganda, Tanzania, and Ethiopia under the Eastern Africa Power Pool framework

objectives.title: Route Network Profitability Restoration
objectives.description: Restore profitability on all trunk routes and achieve EBITDA margin of 8% by FY2025, aligned with the Big Four Agenda on manufacturing and tourism

objectives.title: Cargo Hub Development at JKIA
objectives.description: Develop Jomo Kenyatta International Airport as a regional cargo hub handling 500,000 tonnes annually by 2026

objectives.title: System Loss Reduction to 15%
objectives.description: Reduce total system losses from 23% to 15% through smart metering, network upgrades, and anti-theft measures

objectives.title: LAPSSET Corridor Port of Lamu Development
objectives.description: Complete Phase 1 of Lamu Port with 3 operational berths to anchor the LAPSSET Corridor connecting Kenya, Ethiopia, and South Sudan

objectives.title: SGR Debt Restructuring and Sustainability
objectives.description: Negotiate restructuring of KES 737.5 billion SGR debt with Exim Bank of China to achieve debt sustainability and operational viability

objectives.title: Northern Corridor Pipeline Extension to Kampala
objectives.description: Extend petroleum pipeline from Eldoret to Kampala, Uganda, to serve the regional market and reduce road transport of fuel

kpis.name: Installed Geothermal Capacity (MW)
kpis.description: Total installed geothermal generation capacity in megawatts

kpis.name: EBITDA Margin (%)
kpis.description: Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation and amortisation as percentage of revenue

kpis.name: System Losses (%)
kpis.description: Total technical and non-technical system losses as percentage of units purchased

kpis.name: Container Throughput (TEUs)
kpis.description: Annual container throughput in twenty-foot equivalent units

kpis.name: SGR Freight Revenue (KES Billion)
kpis.description: Annual freight revenue from Standard Gauge Railway operations

kpis.name: Pipeline Throughput (Million Litres/Month)
kpis.description: Monthly petroleum throughput across the pipeline network

kpis.name: Digital Viewership (Million Unique Viewers)
kpis.description: Monthly unique viewers across digital and OTT platforms

kpis.name: Plant Availability Factor (%)
kpis.description: Percentage of time generation plants are available for dispatch
